subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-06-15 in Tiberias
subcodes.first_line: The Cause appeared in Persia. The blood of so many martyrs was shed in Persia that, unquestionably, signs will appear.
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Eastern values; culture, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @martyrs and martyrdom
